{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/GRAPH.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Граф связей проектов"
tags:
  * general
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Граф связей проектов

Рёбра = совместные упоминания в одном файле (≥ 2 раз).

{code:language=mermaid}
graph TD
  subgraph ingestion[INGESTION]
    Svyazi[Svyazi]
    CardIndex[CardIndex]
    Firecrawl[Firecrawl]
  end
  subgraph knowledge[KNOWLEDGE]
    AgentFS[AgentFS]
    knowledge_space[knowledge-space]
    Wikontic[Wikontic]
  end
  subgraph memory[MEMORY]
    Yodoca[Yodoca]
    NGT_Memory[NGT Memory]
    MemNet[MemNet]
  end
  subgraph rag[RAG]
    LiteParse[LiteParse]
    Legal_RAG[Legal RAG]
    Hybrid_RAG[Hybrid RAG]
    Graph_RAG[Graph RAG]
  end
  subgraph orchestration[ORCHESTRATION]
    mclaude[mclaude]
    AI_Factory[AI Factory]
    Rufler[Rufler]
    AutoResearch[AutoResearch]
  end
  subgraph security[SECURITY]
    SENTINEL[SENTINEL]
    LiteLLM[LiteLLM]
    Auto_AI_Router[Auto AI Router]
    Tool_Search[Tool Search]
  end
  subgraph sync[SYNC]
    Yjs[Yjs]
    Automerge[Automerge]
  end
  Svyazi -- 203 --> Yodoca
  Svyazi -- 178 --> CardIndex
  Svyazi -- 167 --> AgentFS
  AgentFS -- 147 --> Yodoca
  Svyazi -- 142 --> knowledge_space
  Svyazi -- 139 --> Rufler
  Svyazi -- 139 --> NGT_Memory
  CardIndex -- 135 --> AgentFS
  CardIndex -- 135 --> Yodoca
  Svyazi -- 133 --> mclaude
  Svyazi -- 127 --> LiteParse
  Svyazi -- 126 --> MemNet
  AgentFS -- 125 --> knowledge_space
  Svyazi -- 122 --> SENTINEL
  Rufler -- 122 --> Yodoca
  Yodoca -- 122 --> NGT_Memory
  knowledge_space -- 119 --> Yodoca
  mclaude -- 118 --> Yodoca
  Svyazi -- 118 --> AI_Factory
  AgentFS -- 117 --> Rufler
  AgentFS -- 114 --> SENTINEL
  CardIndex -- 113 --> knowledge_space
  AgentFS -- 112 --> LiteParse
  Svyazi -- 110 --> Auto_AI_Router
  mclaude -- 109 --> Rufler
  AgentFS -- 107 --> mclaude
  LiteParse -- 107 --> Yodoca
  mclaude -- 106 --> AI_Factory
  CardIndex -- 105 --> Rufler
  CardIndex -- 105 --> LiteParse
  knowledge_space -- 105 --> Rufler
  knowledge_space -- 104 --> mclaude
  Yodoca -- 103 --> SENTINEL
  AI_Factory -- 103 --> Yodoca
  AgentFS -- 103 --> NGT_Memory
  Yodoca -- 102 --> MemNet
  CardIndex -- 102 --> NGT_Memory
  mclaude -- 101 --> LiteParse
  Rufler -- 101 --> SENTINEL
  AgentFS -- 101 --> AI_Factory
  CardIndex -- 100 --> mclaude
  knowledge_space -- 99 --> LiteParse
  Rufler -- 99 --> LiteParse
  SENTINEL -- 99 --> Auto_AI_Router
  CardIndex -- 97 --> AI_Factory
  AI_Factory -- 96 --> Rufler
  knowledge_space -- 96 --> NGT_Memory
  CardIndex -- 94 --> SENTINEL
  AI_Factory -- 91 --> LiteParse
  LiteParse -- 91 --> SENTINEL
  mclaude -- 90 --> NGT_Memory
  AgentFS -- 89 --> Auto_AI_Router
  Yodoca -- 88 --> Auto_AI_Router
  Svyazi -- 87 --> AutoResearch
  Svyazi -- 86 --> Legal_RAG
  AI_Factory -- 86 --> NGT_Memory
  NGT_Memory -- 85 --> Auto_AI_Router
  knowledge_space -- 84 --> SENTINEL
  Svyazi -- 84 --> Graph_RAG
  knowledge_space -- 83 --> AI_Factory
  LiteParse -- 82 --> Auto_AI_Router
  CardIndex -- 82 --> Auto_AI_Router
  AI_Factory -- 82 --> SENTINEL
  Rufler -- 82 --> NGT_Memory
  LiteParse -- 82 --> Legal_RAG
  LiteLLM -- 81 --> Auto_AI_Router
  LiteParse -- 81 --> NGT_Memory
  mclaude -- 80 --> SENTINEL
  NGT_Memory -- 80 --> SENTINEL
  SENTINEL -- 79 --> Tool_Search
  Svyazi -- 78 --> Tool_Search
  Rufler -- 78 --> Auto_AI_Router
  Graph_RAG -- 77 --> SENTINEL
  Legal_RAG -- 75 --> Graph_RAG
  Legal_RAG -- 75 --> SENTINEL
  AgentFS -- 74 --> Tool_Search
  knowledge_space -- 74 --> MemNet
  Yodoca -- 74 --> AutoResearch
  Svyazi -- 74 --> LiteLLM
  Legal_RAG -- 74 --> Auto_AI_Router
  SENTINEL -- 74 --> LiteLLM
  CardIndex -- 73 --> MemNet
  AgentFS -- 73 --> Legal_RAG
  Auto_AI_Router -- 72 --> Tool_Search
  knowledge_space -- 72 --> Auto_AI_Router
  LiteParse -- 72 --> Graph_RAG
  LiteLLM -- 71 --> Tool_Search
  mclaude -- 71 --> Auto_AI_Router
  AI_Factory -- 71 --> Auto_AI_Router
  Graph_RAG -- 71 --> Auto_AI_Router
  CardIndex -- 70 --> Tool_Search
  Rufler -- 70 --> MemNet
  AgentFS -- 70 --> Graph_RAG
  Legal_RAG -- 70 --> Yodoca
  Svyazi -- 69 --> Wikontic
  AgentFS -- 69 --> MemNet
  Yodoca -- 68 --> Tool_Search
  AgentFS -- 68 --> AutoResearch
  Rufler -- 68 --> AutoResearch
  LiteParse -- 68 --> LiteLLM
  LiteParse -- 68 --> Tool_Search
  AgentFS -- 68 --> LiteLLM
  LiteParse -- 67 --> MemNet
  Svyazi -- 67 --> Hybrid_RAG
  LiteParse -- 67 --> Hybrid_RAG
  Legal_RAG -- 67 --> NGT_Memory
  CardIndex -- 66 --> LiteLLM
  Rufler -- 66 --> Legal_RAG
  CardIndex -- 65 --> AutoResearch
  mclaude -- 65 --> AutoResearch
  AI_Factory -- 65 --> AutoResearch
  CardIndex -- 65 --> Legal_RAG
  Graph_RAG -- 65 --> Yodoca
  Yodoca -- 65 --> LiteLLM
  Yodoca -- 64 --> Wikontic
  mclaude -- 64 --> MemNet
  LiteParse -- 64 --> AutoResearch
  AI_Factory -- 64 --> Tool_Search
  AI_Factory -- 63 --> LiteLLM
  Rufler -- 63 --> Graph_RAG
  Graph_RAG -- 63 --> NGT_Memory
  CardIndex -- 62 --> Hybrid_RAG
  AgentFS -- 62 --> Hybrid_RAG
  mclaude -- 62 --> Legal_RAG
  Svyazi -- 61 --> Yjs
  knowledge_space -- 61 --> Legal_RAG
  Hybrid_RAG -- 61 --> Yodoca
  Rufler -- 60 --> Tool_Search
  NGT_Memory -- 60 --> MemNet
  NGT_Memory -- 60 --> LiteLLM
  knowledge_space -- 59 --> AutoResearch
  AI_Factory -- 59 --> Legal_RAG
  Legal_RAG -- 59 --> Hybrid_RAG
  CardIndex -- 57 --> Graph_RAG
  mclaude -- 57 --> Graph_RAG
  mclaude -- 57 --> LiteLLM
  mclaude -- 57 --> Tool_Search
  Hybrid_RAG -- 57 --> NGT_Memory
  Hybrid_RAG -- 57 --> SENTINEL
  Hybrid_RAG -- 57 --> Auto_AI_Router
  NGT_Memory -- 57 --> AutoResearch
  knowledge_space -- 56 --> Graph_RAG
  knowledge_space -- 56 --> Tool_Search
  AI_Factory -- 56 --> Hybrid_RAG
  Rufler -- 56 --> LiteLLM
  CardIndex -- 55 --> Yjs
  knowledge_space -- 55 --> LiteLLM
  mclaude -- 55 --> Hybrid_RAG
  Rufler -- 55 --> Hybrid_RAG
  Legal_RAG -- 55 --> LiteLLM
  Hybrid_RAG -- 55 --> Graph_RAG
  Hybrid_RAG -- 55 --> LiteLLM
  NGT_Memory -- 55 --> Tool_Search
  Yjs -- 54 --> Automerge
  Legal_RAG -- 54 --> Tool_Search
  knowledge_space -- 53 --> Hybrid_RAG
  Auto_AI_Router -- 53 --> AutoResearch
  AI_Factory -- 52 --> MemNet
  MemNet -- 52 --> SENTINEL
  CardIndex -- 51 --> Wikontic
  MemNet -- 51 --> Auto_AI_Router
  Svyazi -- 50 --> Automerge
  MemNet -- 50 --> Wikontic
  AI_Factory -- 50 --> Graph_RAG
  Yodoca -- 49 --> Yjs
  Hybrid_RAG -- 49 --> Tool_Search
  NGT_Memory -- 49 --> Wikontic
  LiteLLM -- 49 --> AutoResearch
  AgentFS -- 48 --> Yjs
  knowledge_space -- 48 --> Yjs
  MemNet -- 48 --> AutoResearch
  SENTINEL -- 48 --> AutoResearch
  Graph_RAG -- 47 --> LiteLLM
  Rufler -- 46 --> Yjs
  LiteParse -- 46 --> Yjs
  Yodoca -- 45 --> Automerge
  Graph_RAG -- 45 --> Tool_Search
  NGT_Memory -- 45 --> Yjs
  CardIndex -- 44 --> Automerge
  AgentFS -- 44 --> Automerge
  knowledge_space -- 44 --> Wikontic
  knowledge_space -- 44 --> Automerge
  Rufler -- 44 --> Automerge
  AutoResearch -- 44 --> Yjs
  Legal_RAG -- 44 --> MemNet
  Graph_RAG -- 44 --> MemNet
  AgentFS -- 43 --> Wikontic
  Tool_Search -- 43 --> AutoResearch
  mclaude -- 42 --> Yjs
  LiteParse -- 42 --> Automerge
  AutoResearch -- 42 --> Automerge
  mclaude -- 40 --> Automerge
  Hybrid_RAG -- 40 --> AutoResearch
  NGT_Memory -- 40 --> Automerge
  MemNet -- 39 --> LiteLLM
  AI_Factory -- 39 --> Yjs
  Auto_AI_Router -- 39 --> Yjs
  Rufler -- 38 --> Wikontic
  Hybrid_RAG -- 38 --> MemNet
  LiteParse -- 37 --> Wikontic
  MemNet -- 37 --> Yjs
  AI_Factory -- 37 --> Automerge
  MemNet -- 36 --> Tool_Search
  Svyazi -- 35 --> Firecrawl
  Legal_RAG -- 35 --> AutoResearch
  Hybrid_RAG -- 34 --> Yjs
  Hybrid_RAG -- 34 --> Automerge
  Graph_RAG -- 34 --> AutoResearch
  SENTINEL -- 34 --> Yjs
  Auto_AI_Router -- 34 --> Automerge
  MemNet -- 32 --> Automerge
  AutoResearch -- 32 --> Wikontic
  AgentFS -- 32 --> Firecrawl
  knowledge_space -- 32 --> Firecrawl
  Yodoca -- 32 --> Firecrawl
  SENTINEL -- 32 --> Automerge
  LiteLLM -- 32 --> Yjs
  LiteLLM -- 32 --> Automerge
  mclaude -- 31 --> Wikontic
  CardIndex -- 31 --> Firecrawl
  Rufler -- 30 --> Firecrawl
  Legal_RAG -- 30 --> Yjs
  Graph_RAG -- 30 --> Yjs
  SENTINEL -- 29 --> Firecrawl
  SENTINEL -- 29 --> Wikontic
  AI_Factory -- 28 --> Wikontic
  Legal_RAG -- 28 --> Automerge
  Graph_RAG -- 28 --> Automerge
  Tool_Search -- 27 --> Yjs
  Tool_Search -- 27 --> Automerge
  Wikontic -- 25 --> Yjs
  LiteParse -- 25 --> Firecrawl
  MemNet -- 25 --> Firecrawl
  Auto_AI_Router -- 24 --> Wikontic
  Wikontic -- 24 --> Firecrawl
  Wikontic -- 23 --> Automerge
  AI_Factory -- 23 --> Firecrawl
  Hybrid_RAG -- 23 --> Wikontic
  Graph_RAG -- 23 --> Wikontic
  mclaude -- 21 --> Firecrawl
  Legal_RAG -- 20 --> Wikontic
  Hybrid_RAG -- 20 --> Firecrawl
  NGT_Memory -- 20 --> Firecrawl
  LiteLLM -- 20 --> Wikontic
  Tool_Search -- 20 --> Wikontic
  LiteLLM -- 18 --> Firecrawl
  Auto_AI_Router -- 18 --> Firecrawl
  Tool_Search -- 18 --> Firecrawl
  AutoResearch -- 18 --> Firecrawl
  Firecrawl -- 18 --> Yjs
  Firecrawl -- 18 --> Automerge
  Legal_RAG -- 17 --> Firecrawl
  Graph_RAG -- 17 --> Firecrawl
{code}

h2. Топ совместных упоминаний

|| Проект A || Проект B || Файлов вместе ||
|| **Svyazi** || **Yodoca** || 203 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **CardIndex** || 178 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **AgentFS** || 167 ||
|| **AgentFS** || **Yodoca** || 147 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **knowledge-space** || 142 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **Rufler** || 139 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **NGT Memory** || 139 ||
|| **CardIndex** || **AgentFS** || 135 ||
|| **CardIndex** || **Yodoca** || 135 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **mclaude** || 133 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **LiteParse** || 127 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **MemNet** || 126 ||
|| **AgentFS** || **knowledge-space** || 125 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **SENTINEL** || 122 ||
|| **Rufler** || **Yodoca** || 122 ||
|| **Yodoca** || **NGT Memory** || 122 ||
|| **knowledge-space** || **Yodoca** || 119 ||
|| **mclaude** || **Yodoca** || 118 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **AI Factory** || 118 ||
|| **AgentFS** || **Rufler** || 117 ||
|| **AgentFS** || **SENTINEL** || 114 ||
|| **CardIndex** || **knowledge-space** || 113 ||
|| **AgentFS** || **LiteParse** || 112 ||
|| **Svyazi** || **Auto AI Router** || 110 ||
|| **mclaude** || **Rufler** || 109 ||

h2. DOT-формат (Graphviz)

{code:language=dot}
digraph lorenzo {
  rankdir=LR;
  node [shape=box];
  subgraph cluster_ingestion {
    label="INGESTION";
    Svyazi [label="Svyazi"];
    CardIndex [label="CardIndex"];
    Firecrawl [label="Firecrawl"];
  }
  subgraph cluster_knowledge {
    label="KNOWLEDGE";
    AgentFS [label="AgentFS"];
    knowledge_space [label="knowledge-space"];
    Wikontic [label="Wikontic"];
  }
  subgraph cluster_memory {
    label="MEMORY";
    Yodoca [label="Yodoca"];
    NGT_Memory [label="NGT Memory"];
    MemNet [label="MemNet"];
  }
  subgraph cluster_rag {
    label="RAG";
    LiteParse [label="LiteParse"];
    Legal_RAG [label="Legal RAG"];
    Hybrid_RAG [label="Hybrid RAG"];
    Graph_RAG [label="Graph RAG"];
  }
  subgraph cluster_orchestration {
    label="ORCHESTRATION";
    mclaude [label="mclaude"];
    AI_Factory [label="AI Factory"];
    Rufler [label="Rufler"];
    AutoResearch [label="AutoResearch"];
  }
  subgraph cluster_security {
    label="SECURITY";
    SENTINEL [label="SENTINEL"];
    LiteLLM [label="LiteLLM"];
    Auto_AI_Router [label="Auto AI Router"];
    Tool_Search [label="Tool Search"];
  }
  subgraph cluster_sync {
    label="SYNC";
    Yjs [label="Yjs"];
    Automerge [label="Automerge"];
  }
  Svyazi -> CardIndex [label="178"];
  Svyazi -> AgentFS [label="167"];
  Svyazi -> Yodoca [label="203"];
  Svyazi -> Wikontic [label="69"];
  CardIndex -> AgentFS [label="135"];
  CardIndex -> Yodoca [label="135"];
  CardIndex -> Wikontic [label="51"];
  AgentFS -> Yodoca [label="147"];
  AgentFS -> Wikontic [label="43"];
  Yodoca -> Wikontic [label="64"];
  Svyazi -> SENTINEL [label="122"];
  Svyazi -> Tool_Search [label="78"];
  CardIndex -> SENTINEL [label="94"];
  CardIndex -> Tool_Search [label="70"];
  AgentFS -> SENTINEL [label="114"];
  AgentFS -> Tool_Search [label="74"];
  Yodoca -> SENTINEL [label="103"];
  Yodoca -> Tool_Search [label="68"];
  SENTINEL -> Tool_Search [label="79"];
  Svyazi -> knowledge_space [label="142"];
  Svyazi -> mclaude [label="133"];
  Svyazi -> Rufler [label="139"];
  Svyazi -> LiteParse [label="127"];
  Svyazi -> MemNet [label="126"];
  Svyazi -> AutoResearch [label="87"];
  Svyazi -> Yjs [label="61"];
  Svyazi -> Automerge [label="50"];
  CardIndex -> knowledge_space [label="113"];
  CardIndex -> mclaude [label="100"];
  CardIndex -> Rufler [label="105"];
  CardIndex -> LiteParse [label="105"];
  CardIndex -> MemNet [label="73"];
  CardIndex -> AutoResearch [label="65"];
  CardIndex -> Yjs [label="55"];
  CardIndex -> Automerge [label="44"];
  AgentFS -> knowledge_space [label="125"];
  AgentFS -> mclaude [label="107"];
  AgentFS -> Rufler [label="117"];
  AgentFS -> LiteParse [label="112"];
  AgentFS -> MemNet [label="69"];
  AgentFS -> AutoResearch [label="68"];
  AgentFS -> Yjs [label="48"];
  AgentFS -> Automerge [label="44"];
  knowledge_space -> mclaude [label="104"];
  knowledge_space -> Rufler [label="105"];
  knowledge_space -> LiteParse [label="99"];
  knowledge_space -> Yodoca [label="119"];
  knowledge_space -> MemNet [label="74"];
  knowledge_space -> AutoResearch [label="59"];
  knowledge_space -> Wikontic [label="44"];
  knowledge_space -> Yjs [label="48"];
  knowledge_space -> Automerge [label="44"];
  mclaude -> Rufler [label="109"];
  mclaude -> LiteParse [label="101"];
  mclaude -> Yodoca [label="118"];
  mclaude -> MemNet [label="64"];
  mclaude -> AutoResearch [label="65"];
  mclaude -> Wikontic [label="31"];
  mclaude -> Yjs [label="42"];
  mclaude -> Automerge [label="40"];
  Rufler -> LiteParse [label="99"];
  Rufler -> Yodoca [label="122"];
  Rufler -> MemNet [label="70"];
  Rufler -> AutoResearch [label="68"];
  Rufler -> Wikontic [label="38"];
  Rufler -> Yjs [label="46"];
  Rufler -> Automerge [label="44"];
  LiteParse -> Yodoca [label="107"];
  LiteParse -> MemNet [label="67"];
  LiteParse -> AutoResearch [label="64"];
  LiteParse -> Wikontic [label="37"];
  LiteParse -> Yjs [label="46"];
  LiteParse -> Automerge [label="42"];
  Yodoca -> MemNet [label="102"];
  Yodoca -> AutoResearch [label="74"];
  Yodoca -> Yjs [label="49"];
  Yodoca -> Automerge [label="45"];
  MemNet -> AutoResearch [label="48"];
  MemNet -> Wikontic [label="50"];
  MemNet -> Yjs [label="37"];
  MemNet -> Automerge [label="32"];
  AutoResearch -> Wikontic [label="32"];
  AutoResearch -> Yjs [label="44"];
  AutoResearch -> Automerge [label="42"];
  Wikontic -> Yjs [label="25"];
  Wikontic -> Automerge [label="23"];
  Yjs -> Automerge [label="54"];
  Svyazi -> Firecrawl [label="35"];
  CardIndex -> Firecrawl [label="31"];
  AgentFS -> Firecrawl [label="32"];
  knowledge_space -> SENTINEL [label="84"];
  knowledge_space -> Firecrawl [label="32"];
  Rufler -> SENTINEL [label="101"];
  Rufler -> Firecrawl [label="30"];
  Yodoca -> Firecrawl [label="32"];
  SENTINEL -> Firecrawl [label="29"];
  Svyazi -> LiteLLM [label="74"];
  Svyazi -> Auto_AI_Router [label="110"];
  LiteParse -> LiteLLM [label="68"];
  LiteParse -> Auto_AI_Router [label="82"];
  LiteParse -> Tool_Search [label="68"];
  MemNet -> LiteLLM [label="39"];
  MemNet -> Auto_AI_Router [label="51"];
  MemNet -> Tool_Search [label="36"];
  LiteLLM -> Auto_AI_Router [label="81"];
  LiteLLM -> Tool_Search [label="71"];
  Auto_AI_Router -> Tool_Search [label="72"];
  Svyazi -> AI_Factory [label="118"];
  CardIndex -> AI_Factory [label="97"];
  AgentFS -> AI_Factory [label="101"];
  knowledge_space -> AI_Factory [label="83"];
  mclaude -> AI_Factory [label="106"];
  AI_Factory -> Rufler [label="96"];
  AI_Factory -> LiteParse [label="91"];
  AI_Factory -> Yodoca [label="103"];
  AI_Factory -> MemNet [label="52"];
  AI_Factory -> AutoResearch [label="65"];
  AI_Factory -> Yjs [label="39"];
  AI_Factory -> Automerge [label="37"];
  Svyazi -> Legal_RAG [label="86"];
  Svyazi -> Hybrid_RAG [label="67"];
  Svyazi -> Graph_RAG [label="84"];
  Svyazi -> NGT_Memory [label="139"];
  CardIndex -> Legal_RAG [label="65"];
  CardIndex -> Hybrid_RAG [label="62"];
  CardIndex -> Graph_RAG [label="57"];
  CardIndex -> NGT_Memory [label="102"];
  CardIndex -> LiteLLM [label="66"];
  CardIndex -> Auto_AI_Router [label="82"];
  AgentFS -> Legal_RAG [label="73"];
  AgentFS -> Hybrid_RAG [label="62"];
  AgentFS -> Graph_RAG [label="70"];
  AgentFS -> NGT_Memory [label="103"];
  AgentFS -> LiteLLM [label="68"];
  AgentFS -> Auto_AI_Router [label="89"];
  knowledge_space -> Legal_RAG [label="61"];
  knowledge_space -> Hybrid_RAG [label="53"];
  knowledge_space -> Graph_RAG [label="56"];
  knowledge_space -> NGT_Memory [label="96"];
  knowledge_space -> LiteLLM [label="55"];
  knowledge_space -> Auto_AI_Router [label="72"];
  knowledge_space -> Tool_Search [label="56"];
  mclaude -> Legal_RAG [label="62"];
  mclaude -> Hybrid_RAG [label="55"];
  mclaude -> Graph_RAG [label="57"];
  mclaude -> NGT_Memory [label="90"];
  mclaude -> SENTINEL [label="80"];
  mclaude -> LiteLLM [label="57"];
  mclaude -> Auto_AI_Router [label="71"];
  mclaude -> Tool_Search [label="57"];
  mclaude -> Firecrawl [label="21"];
  AI_Factory -> Legal_RAG [label="59"];
  AI_Factory -> Hybrid_RAG [label="56"];
  AI_Factory -> Graph_RAG [label="50"];
  AI_Factory -> NGT_Memory [label="86"];
  AI_Factory -> SENTINEL [label="82"];
  AI_Factory -> LiteLLM [label="63"];
  AI_Factory -> Auto_AI_Router [label="71"];
  AI_Factory -> Tool_Search [label="64"];
  AI_Factory -> Wikontic [label="28"];
  AI_Factory -> Firecrawl [label="23"];
  Rufler -> Legal_RAG [label="66"];
  Rufler -> Hybrid_RAG [label="55"];
  Rufler -> Graph_RAG [label="63"];
  Rufler -> NGT_Memory [label="82"];
  Rufler -> LiteLLM [label="56"];
  Rufler -> Auto_AI_Router [label="78"];
  Rufler -> Tool_Search [label="60"];
  LiteParse -> Legal_RAG [label="82"];
  LiteParse -> Hybrid_RAG [label="67"];
  LiteParse -> Graph_RAG [label="72"];
  LiteParse -> NGT_Memory [label="81"];
  LiteParse -> SENTINEL [label="91"];
  LiteParse -> Firecrawl [label="25"];
  Legal_RAG -> Hybrid_RAG [label="59"];
  Legal_RAG -> Graph_RAG [label="75"];
  Legal_RAG -> Yodoca [label="70"];
  Legal_RAG -> NGT_Memory [label="67"];
  Legal_RAG -> MemNet [label="44"];
  Legal_RAG -> SENTINEL [label="75"];
  Legal_RAG -> LiteLLM [label="55"];
  Legal_RAG -> Auto_AI_Router [label="74"];
  Legal_RAG -> Tool_Search [label="54"];
  Legal_RAG -> AutoResearch [label="35"];
  Legal_RAG -> Wikontic [label="20"];
  Legal_RAG -> Firecrawl [label="17"];
  Legal_RAG -> Yjs [label="30"];
  Legal_RAG -> Automerge [label="28"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Graph_RAG [label="55"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Yodoca [label="61"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> NGT_Memory [label="57"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> MemNet [label="38"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> SENTINEL [label="57"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> LiteLLM [label="55"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Auto_AI_Router [label="57"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Tool_Search [label="49"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> AutoResearch [label="40"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Wikontic [label="23"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Firecrawl [label="20"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Yjs [label="34"];
  Hybrid_RAG -> Automerge [label="34"];
  Graph_RAG -> Yodoca [label="65"];
  Graph_RAG -> NGT_Memory [label="63"];
  Graph_RAG -> MemNet [label="44"];
  Graph_RAG -> SENTINEL [label="77"];
  Graph_RAG -> LiteLLM [label="47"];
  Graph_RAG -> Auto_AI_Router [label="71"];
  Graph_RAG -> Tool_Search [label="45"];
  Graph_RAG -> AutoResearch [label="34"];
  Graph_RAG -> Wikontic [label="23"];
  Graph_RAG -> Firecrawl [label="17"];
  Graph_RAG -> Yjs [label="30"];
  Graph_RAG -> Automerge [label="28"];
  Yodoca -> NGT_Memory [label="122"];
  Yodoca -> LiteLLM [label="65"];
  Yodoca -> Auto_AI_Router [label="88"];
  NGT_Memory -> MemNet [label="60"];
  NGT_Memory -> SENTINEL [label="80"];
  NGT_Memory -> LiteLLM [label="60"];
  NGT_Memory -> Auto_AI_Router [label="85"];
  NGT_Memory -> Tool_Search [label="55"];
  NGT_Memory -> AutoResearch [label="57"];
  NGT_Memory -> Wikontic [label="49"];
  NGT_Memory -> Firecrawl [label="20"];
  NGT_Memory -> Yjs [label="45"];
  NGT_Memory -> Automerge [label="40"];
  MemNet -> SENTINEL [label="52"];
  MemNet -> Firecrawl [label="25"];
  SENTINEL -> LiteLLM [label="74"];
  SENTINEL -> Auto_AI_Router [label="99"];
  SENTINEL -> AutoResearch [label="48"];
  SENTINEL -> Wikontic [label="29"];
  SENTINEL -> Yjs [label="34"];
  SENTINEL -> Automerge [label="32"];
  LiteLLM -> AutoResearch [label="49"];
  LiteLLM -> Wikontic [label="20"];
  LiteLLM -> Firecrawl [label="18"];
  LiteLLM -> Yjs [label="32"];
  LiteLLM -> Automerge [label="32"];
  Auto_AI_Router -> AutoResearch [label="53"];
  Auto_AI_Router -> Wikontic [label="24"];
  Auto_AI_Router -> Firecrawl [label="18"];
  Auto_AI_Router -> Yjs [label="39"];
  Auto_AI_Router -> Automerge [label="34"];
  Tool_Search -> AutoResearch [label="43"];
  Tool_Search -> Wikontic [label="20"];
  Tool_Search -> Firecrawl [label="18"];
  Tool_Search -> Yjs [label="27"];
  Tool_Search -> Automerge [label="27"];
  AutoResearch -> Firecrawl [label="18"];
  Wikontic -> Firecrawl [label="24"];
  Firecrawl -> Yjs [label="18"];
  Firecrawl -> Automerge [label="18"];
}
{code}
